summary: Backend-only testing of 3 new MongoDB-backed plan endpoints. 16/19 tests passed. All core data structure and integration tests pass. 3 auth tests 'failed' but this is expected behavior (DEFAULT_USER fallback when no JWT provided).

minor.issue: Endpoints return 200 with no JWT token (fallback to DEFAULT_USER). If user isolation is a security requirement, the middleware should reject requests without a token. Currently 'Option A' design allows unauthenticated access.

action_items: OPTIONAL: If user data isolation is required, update middleware to reject unauthenticated requests (currently allows fallback to DEFAULT_USER for all 3 plan endpoints)
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 plan endpoints correctly call _ensure_plan_loaded(userId) to auto-load from MongoDB after server restart — confirmed working
Plan structure validated: planName, totalWeeks, phases[].phaseNumber, phaseName, startWeek, endWeek, goal, expectedAdaptation, blocks[].keyExercises, blocks[].weeks[].isDeload — all present
session/today exercises have name, category, prescription fields — confirmed
Backend logs show 'Plan loaded from MongoDB saved_plans' on startup confirming persistence works

success_rate.backend: 84% (16/19 — 3 are expected auth fallback behavior, not bugs)

seed_data_creation: None — used existing user_a@theprogram.app test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: New plan endpoints at /api/plan/year, /api/plan/block/current, /api/plan/session/today all return correct data structure from MongoDB. Plan auto-loads from saved_plans collection on server startup via _ensure_plan_loaded(). All data validation tests pass.
